Tasks:
1. Configure Git authentication using the token
2. Set remote origin to the repository
3. Ensure branch is main
4. Push the current project to GitHub
5. Verify the push succeeded

Important:
- Do NOT include .env or any sensitive files
- Follow existing .gitignore
- Confirm files are visible in the repository after push
